name: City Zombie Survival 2D
description: Your mission is to destroy all zombies in the city. You can use weapons like a katana, pistol, shotgun, and many more weapons that need to be unlocked by playing the game. You can play on three different maps and unlock characters and weapons to eliminate all enemy zombies from the city. Website Developer <a href='https://www.crazygamesonline.com'>https://www.crazygamesonline.com</a>
instructions: WASD Walk MouseLeft S Fire MouseRight W upArrow Collect A LeftArrow Left D RightArrow Right For mobile users use button from the game
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Android, city, Collecting, HTML5, iPad, iPhone, Mentolatux, Mobile, Shooting, survival, Zombie
